_comment: synthetic-dev: ONE-NODE rtsm fleet. rtsm-client always discovers via GET /fleet/discover — served only in fleet mode — so the local node runs as a single-node FLEET (itself the only member; no peers to mesh with) rather than bare single-instance mode. up.sh launches rtsm-api with FLEET_CONFIG_PATH=<this file> + FLEET_NODE_NAME=local. endpoint is the BROWSER-visible host and must be a BARE host:port (no scheme) — rtsm-client builds `${scheme}://${endpoint}` itself, deriving the scheme from its bootstrap URL (http for the local stack); a scheme here produces the mangled ws://http/… socket URL.
